← Back to demos

Color Engine — barebones test surface

Pure color math (../color-engine.js): conversion, parsing/serialization, WCAG contrast, accessible adjustment, palette/harmony, perceptual gradients. No DOM or CSS in the engine — every swatch and number below is rendered by the demo consumer from the values the functions return. Deliberately unstyled.

Current color → all formats (live)
OKLCH sliders (push chroma high to watch gamut mapping clamp it back):
formatstring
hex
rgb
hsl
hsv
oklch
oklab
WCAG contrast — current color (foreground) on a background
ratio:
normal textlarge text
AA
AAA
current on background background on current
Palette & harmony (from the current color, in OKLCH)

shades (darker) · base · tints (lighter)

harmony

Gradient interpolation — current color → end color, one bar per space

Compare the perceptual spaces (top) with naive sRGB (bottom): sRGB midpoints go muddy/dark; OKLCH/OKLab stay even and vivid.
